title: OpticalConstructorGroupsLibrary
description: Canonical, hand/LLM-editable groups + experiment-collections library for the Berreman Optical Constructor (Spec 0026 Part G/H, slice 007). Stored as a separate per-user app-data JSON file, kept apart from any per-project .ocproj, so reusable element groups and sample-centred experiment collections are available across projects. Validated on load against this schema (no migration; a schemaVersion mismatch is a validation error). All physical magnitudes carried by a group member's placement are canonical SI meters; displayUnit is a display/IO label only.

schemaVersion.description: The single shipped schema version. A differing value is a validation error, not a migration trigger (Spec 0026, out-of-scope migration).

groups.description: The reusable element groups (G.1). Each group is a named set of member elements, each holding its full configuration, in one of two member modes.

collections.description: The experiment collections (H.1). Each is a named set of experiments sharing the same sample(s), with elements and groups toggled on/off across the collection.

memberMode.description: A group's member mode (G.1.2): at most one member in the beam (mutually exclusive), or zero/one/several (multi-select). A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string.

groupMember.description: One member of an element group (G.1.1): its full configuration (a reused elementPlacement) plus whether it is currently in the beam. The on/off and swap choices flip only inBeam, never the stored placement (G.1.2).

elementGroup.description: A named, reusable element group (G.1.1): a set of member elements, each holding its full configuration, in one of two member modes.

toggle.description: A named on/off toggle (H.1): an experiment, an element, or a group within a collection.

experimentCollection.description: An experiment collection (H.1.1): a named set of experiments sharing the same sample(s), with elements and groups toggled on/off across the collection.

unitOfMeasure.description: Boundary unit-of-measure vocabulary (Part D, D.1). A display/IO label only; the stored magnitude is always canonical SI.

catalogueKind.description: The UI-facing catalogue roles of Part F (Spec 0026 Part A, A.5.1). A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string.

emission.description: Per-element ray-group emission metadata (Spec 0026 Part A, A.7). A fieldless DU serialized as a bare string.

vector3.description: A pure direction 3-vector for box normals / oriented axes (Spec 0026 Part A, A.3.2). Direction only; carries no unit.

tablePoint.description: A point on the 2-D table plane in canonical meters (Spec 0026 Part A, R-2).

boundingBox.description: The element's rectangular bounding box (Spec 0026 Part A, A.3): a square a1 x a2 face extruded by depth b along the primary normal, plus the two normals n1/n2. All extents are canonical SI meters.

elementPlacement.description: One element's placement (Spec 0026 Part A, R-1), reused verbatim as a group member's full configuration. The three rotation angles r1/r2/r3 are the engine Angle single-case union serialized as bare radian numbers; the three lock flags are booleans; valueId is the optional element value id (None serializes as null).
